name: Team RWBY // Awakened
description:
A lost vessel of a war long forgotten, team RWBY stumbles upon you, still in your slumber. You were built to end the war, built to protect. It's time to wake up.

If it wasn't immediately obvious from all the dream and sleep wording, this was inspired by Warframe.

Also, what are some aspects of bot making you think I could improve upon? Like what specific areas need more work do you feel? I'm asking so I can actually improve and not remain stagnant.

Artist~

https://x.com/OfficialRWBY/status/1788609901058564164
creator: BrokenMoonBlade
